ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "supply" INTEGER /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" INTEGER /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" INTEGER /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API URL for the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the exchange's data (hashed and encrypted) */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for accessing the exchange's data (hashed and encrypted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the given time period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the given time period */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency during the given time period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency during the given time period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency during the given time period */,
  "marketcap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency during the given time period */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_24h" INTEGER /* Trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being watched */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User's note or comment about the cryptocurrency in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, news) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base cryptocurrency */,
  "quote_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "min_trade_amount" REAL /* Minimum trade amount for the trading pair */,
  "max_trade_amount" REAL /* Maximum trade amount for the trading pair */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price increment for the trading pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trading pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trading pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_pairs_quote_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_book" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (buy or sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the order */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_book_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES exchange_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who bought the cryptocurrency */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sold the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trade information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES exchange_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
